mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT gm.user_id FROM group_members gm JOIN user_groups ug ON ug.group_id = gm.group_id WHERE gm.group_id IN ( SELECT m.group_id FROM group_members m JOIN user_groups my_ug ON my_ug.group_id = m.group_id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} AND my_ug.deleted_at IS NULL ) AND ug.deleted_at IS NULL UNION SELECT f.followee user_id FROM user_follow f WHERE f.follower = #{userId} ) related_users INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = related_users.user_id INNER JOIN posts p ON p.user_id = related_users.user_id WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.deleted_at IS NULL )

SELECT p.post_id, u.user_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image, p.content, p.like_count, p.created_at FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.user_id = p.user_id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.post_id IN
#{postId}
SELECT post_id, content, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, like_count, user_id FROM posts WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
